timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2027-09 to 2027-09-30 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

scheme_contracts.contract_type: Generation LTESA (cap + floor strike, CPI-linked, NSW Crown counterparty)

timeline_events.title: NSW planning approval (2016)
timeline_events.detail: Coppabella granted NSW state planning consent in 2016 — long pre-dates the LTESA award. Project preparing for construction.

timeline_events.title: NSW LTESA Round 1 underwriting awarded (275 MW)
timeline_events.detail: Coppabella wins the first-ever NSW LTESA Generation round — 275 MW. Goldwind Australia. Southern Tablelands region. One of 4 R1 winners.

sources.title: First round puts NSW one-third to 12GW goal

timeline_events.title: BESS modification on public exhibition
timeline_events.detail: BESS modification placed on public exhibition Dec 2025 — Goldwind adding battery storage to the approved wind farm design.
